subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Jinab-i-Haji Siyyid Ibrahim (Kitab al-Fajr)
subcodes.first_line: The Book of Dawn hath appeared from the horizon of the Command, manifest unto all. Whosoever readeth a single letter thereof turneth toward its direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الفجر من افق الامر قد کان بالجهر مشهودا من قرء حرفا منه توجه الی شطر
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity, @consolation and comfort
